basic_details.job_title: PMC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 60 Junior Engineer & Health Inspector Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Pune Municipal Corporation (PMC) Solid Waste Management Department has invited applications for the PMC Recruitment 2026 drive to fill 60 contract posts — 30 Junior Engineer and 30 Health Inspector vacancies. These are 11-month temporary, contract-based positions with consolidated monthly pay. Eligible candidates can submit applications offline from 29 June 2026 to 13 July 2026, up to 3:00 PM, at the PMC Main Building in Shivajinagar, Pune.

application_fee.details: The official PMC notice for this Junior Engineer and Health Inspector recruitment does not mention any application fee for any category of candidates. Applicants should rely only on the official notification for any fee-related updates if issued separately.

qualification.details: Eligibility for the PMC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 and PMC Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 depends entirely on educational qualification, since the notice does not specify any age limit. Candidates applying for Junior Engineer need a technical degree, while Health Inspector applicants need HSC plus a specific diploma. Science graduates get preference for the Health Inspector post.

salary_details.details: Both posts under this PMC Bharti 2026 carry a fixed consolidated monthly pay rather than a pay matrix or grade pay structure, since these are contract appointments. The Junior Engineer post offers a higher consolidated salary compared to the Health Inspector post, reflecting the difference in qualification requirements.

selection_process: Selection for the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector posts is a two-stage process: document screening followed by a personal interview. If the number of applications received exceeds the number of vacancies
PMC will shortlist candidates based on merit criteria before calling them for interview.

Application Screening: Applications are checked for completeness and attested qualification documents; incomplete applications are rejected outright. Merit-Based Shortlisting: If applications exceed available vacancies
PMC screens them on quality/merit norms and calls only the required number of candidates. Personal Interview: Shortlisted candidates are called for an interview
which they must attend entirely at their own expense (no travel allowance is provided). Final Selection: The Municipal Commissioner
PMC holds final authority over the selection process and decision. Contract Execution: Selected candidates must execute the service contract at their own cost before joining.
how_to_apply: Unlike many government recruitments, the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 application process is entirely offline — there is no apply-online portal mentioned in the official notice. Candidates must prepare a physical application and submit it in person at the designated PMC office before the deadline.
Address the application to the Deputy Commissioner, Solid Waste Management Department, Pune Municipal Corporation.
Clearly mention the post name applied for at the top of the application.
Fill in full name, complete address with pin code, date of birth, age, educational qualification, experience, landline/mobile number, and email ID.
Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the application.
Attach attested true copies of all required documents (listed below).
Submit the completed application during office hours (excluding public holidays) at: Swachh Survekshan War Room, PMC Main Building, 1st Floor, Shivajinagar, Pune – 411005.
Ensure submission is completed before 13 July 2026, 3:00 PM, as late applications will not be accepted.

Candidates searching for a "PMC Recruitment 2026 apply online" link should note that this particular recruitment does not have an online application facility. The PMC Solid Waste Management Department has specified only offline, physical submission of applications at its Shivajinagar office. Anyone offering an online apply link for this specific notice should be treated with caution, since it is not part of the official process described in the notification.

all_official_links.label: Download PMC Junior Engineer & Health Inspector Posts Recruitment 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 is 13 July 2026, up to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 60 total vacancies - 30 for Junior Engineer and 30 for Health Inspector — under the PMC Solid Waste Management Department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for PMC Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech or B.E. degree in Environmental Engineering and Technology from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for PMC Health Inspector post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed HSC along with the Sanitary Inspector course; Science graduates get preference.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official PMC notice for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates apply online for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment does not have an online application process. Applications must be submitted physically at the PMC Main Building, Shivajinagar, Pune.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector posts?
faq.answer: Junior Engineer gets a consolidated monthly pay of ₹50,000, and Health Inspector gets ₹40,000, both on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of these PMC contract posts?
faq.answer: Both posts are temporary and contract-based for a period of 11 months.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age limit for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notice does not specify any age limit or age relaxation for either post.

faq.question: Q10. Will selected candidates get permanent employment in PMC?
faq.answer: No, selected candidates cannot claim any right to a permanent or regular post in PMC and are not eligible for benefits given to regular PMC employees.
